fliki.name: Fliki
fliki.short_description: Fliki turns scripts, blog posts, and ideas into finished videos with AI voiceovers in 2,000+ voices, AI avatars, and translation into 80+ languages.

features.description: Converts scripts or prompts into complete videos with voiceover, visuals, and subtitles.
features.title: Text-to-video

features.description: 2,000+ voices across 80+ languages, including ultra-realistic options.
features.title: AI voiceover

features.description: Creates an AI avatar of the user for consistent on-camera presentation.
features.title: Digital twin avatars

features.description: Repurposes existing articles or PowerPoint slides into narrated videos.
features.title: Blog-to-video and PPT-to-video

features.description: Record a sample to create a personal AI voice.
features.title: Voice cloning

features.description: Localizes videos into 80+ languages.
features.title: Translation and dubbing

features.description: Publishes videos directly to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.
features.title: Direct publishing

pros: Free forever plan available with no credit card required
Very large voice library (2,000+ voices) and broad language coverage
Supports multiple source formats: scripts, blog posts, and slide decks
Direct publishing to social platforms from within the app
cons: Free plan videos are capped at 1 minute, 720p, and include a Fliki watermark
Exact monthly prices for paid Standard and Premium plans are not shown as static text on the pricing page
No dedicated iOS, Android, Mac, or Windows apps mentioned — web-based only

faqs.answer: Yes, Fliki has a free-forever plan with 36 credits per month, 1-minute exports, and 720p resolution, with a watermark.
faqs.question: Is there a free plan?

faqs.answer: Fliki supports 300+ voices across 80+ languages on the free plan, expanding to 1,000+ and 2,000+ voices on paid plans.
faqs.question: What languages does Fliki support?
